errors.name: InvalidLockDays
errors.msg: Lock duration must be between 30 and 360 days

errors.name: CreatorAllocationTooHigh
errors.msg: Creator allocation must be between 0% and 5%

errors.name: InvalidCurveLiquidityPercent
errors.msg: Curve liquidity must be between 25% and 50%

errors.name: InvalidAirdropPercent
errors.msg: Airdrop allocation must be between 0% and 5%

errors.name: InsufficientCombinedLiquidity
errors.msg: Curve liquidity plus circulation must be at least 50%

errors.name: InitialSolTooLow
errors.msg: Initial SOL must be at least 0.5 SOL

errors.name: VestingNotReady
errors.msg: Vesting tranche is not ready yet

errors.name: VestingTrancheDone
errors.msg: This vesting tranche was already used

errors.name: AlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Token already migrated from bonding curve

errors.name: MigrationThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: Migration threshold has not been reached

errors.name: SelfTrade
errors.msg: Buyer and seller cannot be the same address

errors.name: RaydiumPoolAlreadyCreated
errors.msg: Raydium pool already exists for this token

errors.name: InvalidRaydiumCreatePoolFee
errors.msg: Invalid Raydium CPMM create-pool fee account
